This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false

  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false

  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false
[FAIL] Sorting of removeElements
  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false
[FAIL] Sorting of replaceWithChildrenElements
  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false
[FAIL] Sorting of element's attributes
  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false
[FAIL] Sorting of element's removeAttributes
  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false
[FAIL] Sorting of processingInstructions
  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false
[FAIL] Sorting of removeProcessingInstructions
  assert_true: Assert: Either config["processingInstructions"] exists or config["removeProcessingInstructions"] exists. expected true got false
